sentences.translation: Stolar je izgradio lijepu kuću za svoju porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: The carpenter built a beautiful house for his family.

sentences.translation: Sjekao je drveće i klesao drvo vlastitim rukama.
sentences.translationEn: He cut down trees and carved the wood with his own hands.

sentences.translation: Napravio je vrata, prozore i krov.
sentences.translationEn: He made the doors, windows, and roof.

sentences.arabic: أَقَامَتِ الأُسْرَةُ فِي الْبَيْتِ الْجَدِيدِ بِسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je sretno živjela u novoj kući.
sentences.translationEn: The family lived happily in the new house.
